creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
Cool, thanks! If i'll add you too CC-List next time, would that be better? :)

Yeah i think it would be really nice to have 2.4.x available. I can take a look at it but i'm quite busy at the moment. So it it's going to be about tomorrow, until i find time for it. So if you have a chance feel free to, else i'll try to take a look at it asap.
